content.json:
## Linux Extensions Monitor
Track extension deployment status across Arc-enabled Linux servers and Azure VMs. Select up to 4 extensions to compare.

parameters.name: LinExtServerStatus
parameters.label: Server Status
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines' or type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| distinct ServerStatus

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
| extend ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type)
| distinct ExtensionName
| where ExtensionName !contains 'Windows'

resources
| where type in ({LinExtMachineType})
| extend JoinID = toupper(id), OSType = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osType), tolower(tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType))), ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| where ServerStatus in ({LinExtServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('{LinExtension1:value}')
    | extend VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))), ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type), Status = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('linux')
| extend Serverid = id, ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by Serverid, OSType, ServerStatus
| extend status = parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension1:value}']
| project status
| summarize count() by tostring(status)
content.title: {LinExtension1:value}

content.query:
resources
| where type in ({LinExtMachineType})
| extend JoinID = toupper(id), OSType = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osType), tolower(tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType))), ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| where ServerStatus in ({LinExtServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('{LinExtension2:value}')
    | extend VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))), ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type), Status = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('linux')
| extend Serverid = id, ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by Serverid, OSType, ServerStatus
| extend status = parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension2:value}']
| project status
| summarize count() by tostring(status)
content.title: {LinExtension2:value}

content.query:
resources
| where type in ({LinExtMachineType})
| extend JoinID = toupper(id), OSType = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osType), tolower(tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType))), ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| where ServerStatus in ({LinExtServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('{LinExtension3:value}')
    | extend VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))), ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type), Status = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('linux')
| extend Serverid = id, ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by Serverid, OSType, ServerStatus
| extend status = parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension3:value}']
| project status
| summarize count() by tostring(status)
content.title: {LinExtension3:value}

content.query:
resources
| where type in ({LinExtMachineType})
| extend JoinID = toupper(id), OSType = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osType), tolower(tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType))), ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| where ServerStatus in ({LinExtServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('{LinExtension4:value}')
    | extend VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))), ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type), Status = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType in ('linux')
| extend Serverid = id, ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by Serverid, OSType, ServerStatus
| extend status = parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension4:value}']
| project status
| summarize count() by tostring(status)
content.title: {LinExtension4:value}

content.query:
resources
| where type in ({LinExtMachineType})
| extend JoinID = toupper(id),
    OSName = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osProfile.computerName), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.computerName)),
    OSType = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osName), tolower(tostring(properties.storageProfile.osDisk.osType))),
    OSsku = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.osSku), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.osName)),
    ServerStatus = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines', tostring(properties.status), tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.displayStatus))
| where ServerStatus in ({LinExtServerStatus})
| join kind=leftouter (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions' or type == 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('{LinExtension1:value}','{LinExtension2:value}','{LinExtension3:value}','{LinExtension4:value}')
    | extend VMId = toupper(substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions'))),
        ExtensionName = tostring(properties.type),
        Version = iff(type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions', tostring(properties.instanceView.typeHandlerVersion), tostring(properties.typeHandlerVersion)),
        Status = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
) on $left.JoinID == $right.VMId
| where OSType contains 'linux' or OSsku contains 'Linux' or OSsku contains 'Ubuntu' or OSsku contains 'CentOS' or OSsku contains 'RHEL' or OSsku contains 'Debian' or OSsku contains 'SUSE'
| extend ServerName = id, VersionNumber = pack(ExtensionName, Version), ProvisionState = pack(ExtensionName, Status)
| summarize ExtVersions = make_bag(VersionNumber), ExtProvision = make_bag(ProvisionState) by ServerName, OSType, OSName, OSsku, ServerStatus
| extend Extension1Version = tostring(parse_json(ExtVersions)['{LinExtension1:value}']),
    ['1-{LinExtension1:value}'] = iff(isnotnull(parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension1:value}']), parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension1:value}'], ''),
    Extension2Version = tostring(parse_json(ExtVersions)['{LinExtension2:value}']),
    ['2-{LinExtension2:value}'] = iff(isnotnull(parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension2:value}']), parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension2:value}'], ''),
    Extension3Version = tostring(parse_json(ExtVersions)['{LinExtension3:value}']),
    ['3-{LinExtension3:value}'] = iff(isnotnull(parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension3:value}']), parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension3:value}'], ''),
    Extension4Version = tostring(parse_json(ExtVersions)['{LinExtension4:value}']),
    ['4-{LinExtension4:value}'] = iff(isnotnull(parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension4:value}']), parse_json(ExtProvision)['{LinExtension4:value}'], '')
| project ServerName, OSsku, ServerStatus, OSType, ['1-{LinExtension1:value}'], Extension1Version, ['2-{LinExtension2:value}'], Extension2Version, ['3-{LinExtension3:value}'], Extension3Version, ['4-{LinExtension4:value}'], Extension4Version
| sort by Extension1Version
content.title: Linux Extension Details
